name: Wonder Women
overview: A housewife's self-identity is challenged when her husband cheats on her and moves out of the apartment. To help pay for her mortgage, she rents out a room in the apartment. The new tenant just so happens to be tall, handsome, and rich.

trailers.title: 多功能老婆 | 2分鐘預告 | 三個女人 三種愛情關係
